sizing_rule.note: Allocate capital weights to tangent portfolio maximizing (GHPR - RFR) / SD ratio. Parameters (optimal_f, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown_tolerance) not specified by author. Requires calculation of geometric mean HPR, risk-free rate, and return standard deviation across portfolio systems.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should target the tangent portfolio that maximizes the ratio of geometric mean HPR minus the risk-free rate, divided by standard deviation of returns.
